paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings (RoPE) for improved training stability and performance. Achieves competitive performance with fewer parameters compared to larger proprietary models.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, text generation, reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and effective foundation language models using publicly available data
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through backward computation optimizations and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings (RoPE) for improved training stability and performance. Outperforms GPT-3 (175B) on most benchmarks despite being 10× smaller.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, text generation, reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and effective foundation language models using publicly available data
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through backward computation optimizations and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings (RoPE) for improved training stability and performance. Demonstrates strong performance across benchmarks including math reasoning and code generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, text generation, reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and effective foundation language models using publicly available data
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through backward computation optimizations and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces pre-normalization, SwiGLU activation, and rotary positional embeddings (RoPE) for improved training stability and performance. Competitive with PaLM-540B and Chinchilla-70B on most benchmarks despite significantly fewer parameters.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CommonCrawl, C4, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, Stack Exchange, GitHub
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, text generation, reasoning, coding, and instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and effective foundation language models using publicly available data
raw_extraction.extension: Efficient implementation of causal multi-head attention reduces memory usage and runtime through backward computation optimizations and sequence parallelism.
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Efficient training through data sharding and mixed precision, achieving strong performance with fewer parameters than prior models while maintaining open-source accessibility.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl, Stanford Alpaca, Github, Wikipedia, Books, ArXiv, and other public datasets
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, instruction-following, chat applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, efficient, and effective foundation language models with open access
raw_extraction.paper_title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of LLaMA Base with improved performance across benchmarks while retaining efficiency and open-source principles.
